# @cyberfabric/state

> State management for FrontX SDK - event bus, store, and effects using Redux+Flux pattern.

Part of the FrontX SDK Layer (L1) - can be used independently without other @cyberfabric packages. Peer dependency on @reduxjs/toolkit.

## Core API

- [eventBus](https://frontx.dev/docs/state/eventbus): Type-safe event emission and subscription
- [createSlice](https://frontx.dev/docs/state/slices): Create state slices with typed reducers
- [registerSlice](https://frontx.dev/docs/state/slices#register): Register dynamic slices with effects
- [createStore](https://frontx.dev/docs/state/store): Create FrontX store

## Key Patterns

- Actions emit events via eventBus (never dispatch directly)
- Effects subscribe to events and dispatch to their own slice
- Module augmentation for EventPayloadMap and RootState type safety
- One-way flow: Actions -> Events -> Effects -> State updates
